Submodules

cpscraper.config module

This module provides the Scraper config functionality.

cpscraper.config.current_scraper() → Path[source]

Return the current scraper location

cpscraper.config.get_extractor_delete(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/test_scraper_1503_2/settings.ini')) → bool[source]

Return whether to delete processed raw files

cpscraper.config.get_source_file_path(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/test_scraper_1503_2/settings.ini')) → Path[source]

Return the current source file path

cpscraper.config.get_target_folder_path(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/test_scraper_1503_2/settings.ini')) → Path[source]

Return the current scraper location path

cpscraper.config.init_app(target_folder_path: str, source_file_path: str, extractor_delete_files: bool) → int[source]

Initialize the application.

cpscraper.config.restore_app(target_folder_path: Path) → int[source]

Restore existing application.

cpscraper.main module

cpscraper.main.cli_config(delete_processed_files: bool = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, target_folder_path: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, source_file_path: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None[source]

Alter scraper configuration settings

cpscraper.main.extract(start_date: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, end_date: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None[source]

Start extracting data from the fetched files

cpscraper.main.init(headless: bool = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None[source]

Initialise a new scraper instance

cpscraper.main.main(version: bool | None = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None[source]
cpscraper.main.scrape(config_file) → None[source]

Start caching websites

cpscraper.main.scraper_address() → None[source]

Open configured scraper instance folder
